---
title: "Software"
---

A small, curated list of tools and templates I actually use and maintain.  
Most research code stays private until publication; what’s public here is meant to be runnable and representative.

## Featured

- **TranscripTools (R)** — helpers for bulk RNA-seq downstream work (DE result handling, exploratory plots, reporting utilities).  
  Repo: <https://github.com/Francesco-E-Vallone/TranscripTools>

## Apps / templates

- **RNAseq-DB-explorer (R / Shiny)** — local Shiny app to browse heterogeneous bulk RNA-seq datasets (runs locally; no server).  
  Repo: <https://github.com/Francesco-E-Vallone/RNAseq-DB-explorer>

- **RNAseq-alignment-quant** — reproducible example pipeline (FASTQ → align/quant → counts), with clear inputs/outputs.  
  Repo: <https://github.com/Francesco-E-Vallone/RNAseq-alignment-quant>

## Small utilities

- **script-archive** — reusable snippets and one-off scripts not tied to a single project.  
  Repo: <https://github.com/Francesco-E-Vallone/script-archive>
